SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY.description:
Whenever you lose HP, draw 1 card at the start of your next turn.
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-BRUTALITY.title: Brutality
SPIRE1REVAMPED-CONCENTRATE.description:
Discard 2 cards.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to their total cost.
Transform the discarded cards into Shivs.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM.description: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, ALL enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-DISARM.title: Disarm
SPIRE1REVAMPED-GLASS_KNIFE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Decrease this card's damage by {Increase:inverseDiff()} this combat.
SPIRE1REVAMPED-GLASS_KNIFE.title: Glass Knife
SPIRE1REVAMPED-RECURSION.title: Recursion
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FIREWALL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Repeat this effect for each Power played this combat.{InCombat:
(Gains Block {CalculatedBlocks:diff()} {CalculatedBlocks:plural:time|times})|}
SPIRE1REVAMPED-FIREWALL.title: Firewall
